# Miss Scarlett Bridal

> Miss Scarlett is a luxury Australian bridal label reimagining modern bridal fashion with refined design, graceful femininity, and exceptional craftsmanship. Founded in 2019.

## Collections

- [Palais Collection](https://www.missscarlett.com.au/category/palais): Couture-inspired bridal gowns for the bride who desires architectural elegance and modern romance.
- [Lumière Collection](https://www.missscarlett.com.au/category/lumiere): Flowing, radiant bridal gowns that celebrate light, softness, and timeless feminine beauty.
- [Modern Muse Collection](https://www.missscarlett.com.au/category/modern-muse): Contemporary bridal gowns with clean lines, minimalist beauty, and effortless sophistication.
- [Siren Collection](https://www.missscarlett.com.au/category/siren): Sultry, figure-hugging bridal gowns designed for the bold, confident bride.
- [Anniversary Collection](https://www.missscarlett.com.au/category/anniversary): Miss Scarlett's most beloved designs — timeless gowns that have captured brides' hearts since the beginning.
- [Iconic Collection](https://www.missscarlett.com.au/category/iconic): Signature Miss Scarlett designs that have defined the legacy of exquisite bridal fashion.
- [All Wedding Dresses](https://www.missscarlett.com.au/category/all-collections): Browse the complete Miss Scarlett bridal collection.

## Key Pages

- [About Miss Scarlett](https://www.missscarlett.com.au/about): The story behind the brand, founded by Melissa So.
- [Find a Stockist](https://www.missscarlett.com.au/find-a-stockist): Locate a Miss Scarlett bridal boutique in Australia, New Zealand, the Americas, UK, Singapore, Malaysia, or Canada.
- [Book an Appointment](https://www.missscarlett.com.au/book-appointment): Book a private bridal appointment at a stockist boutique.
- [Trunk Shows](https://www.missscarlett.com.au/trunk-shows): Upcoming exclusive bridal events at selected boutiques worldwide.
- [Become a Stockist](https://www.missscarlett.com.au/become-a-stockist): Apply to carry Miss Scarlett gowns in your boutique.
- [Contact Us](https://www.missscarlett.com.au/contact-us): General enquiries and customer support.
- [Journal](https://www.missscarlett.com.au/journal): Bridal inspiration, styling tips, and news.

## Brand Information

- **Founded:** 2019
- **Founder:** Melissa So
- **Location:** NSW, Australia
- **Available in:** Australia, New Zealand, United States, Canada, United Kingdom, Singapore, Malaysia
- **Instagram:** [@missscarlett.thelabel](https://www.instagram.com/missscarlett.thelabel)
- **Email:** support@missscarlett.com.au

## Pricing

Miss Scarlett bridal gowns are luxury pieces. For pricing information, contact your nearest stockist or enquire via the website.
